businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and commercial AI data analytics platform leader with Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform) pillars
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise clients. FY2025 revenue hit $4.48B (+56%). US commercial revenue surpassed $500M. The Pentagon adopted Maven AI as an official program of record, expanding it across the entire US military. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals accelerating growth.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - generative AI integration platform
AIP boot camps - rapid customer conversion programs

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: ~10x the S&P 500 average (23-25x) and ~6x the software sector average (35-40x). Extreme premium, though Forward P/E compresses to 114x on FY2026E EPS of $1.34

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026E EPS of $1.34. Still elevated, but PEG of 2.48 on 65% revenue growth is within high-growth range

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 revenue $4.48B. AI demand explosion drove 56% growth. FY2026 guidance at 65% growth

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Top-tier profitability among software companies. Combined with 82% gross margin, demonstrates powerful earnings leverage

keyMetrics.name: FCF Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Free cash flow of $2.10B. Exceptional cash generation with minimal debt ($229M)

keyMetrics.name: Cash Position
keyMetrics.interpretation: Net cash $6.95B ($2.90/share). Near-zero leverage balance sheet

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Backlog
keyMetrics.interpretation: Multi-year revenue visibility secured. ~2.5x current annual revenue

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI Adopted as Official US Military System
growthDrivers.description: Deputy Secretary of Defense memo on March 9 designated Maven Smart System as official program of record. Long-term deployment across all US military branches confirmed

growthDrivers.title: Iran Conflict Live AI Deployment
growthDrivers.description: NYT reports Palantir operates Pentagon intelligence analysis system using Anthropic AI technology. Combat-proven credentials provide powerful basis for additional contracts

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Revenue Guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confident in growth acceleration. US commercial segment emerging as key growth engine, reducing government dependency

growthDrivers.title: Navy ShipOS $448M + Army $10B Contracts
growthDrivers.description: Major military contracts secured in succession. $11.2B revenue backlog provides long-term visibility

growthDrivers.title: Wall Street Target Price Rally
growthDrivers.description: UBS $200 (Strong Buy upgrade), Wedbush $230 (maintained), Rosenblatt raised from $150 to $200. Broad Wall Street optimism

growthDrivers.title: AIP Boot Camp Commercial Acceleration
growthDrivers.description: Rapid customer acquisition through short-term experience programs driving US commercial revenue past $500M milestone

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record with top-level security clearance, Maven official military adoption, NVIDIA sovereign AI partnership. Iran conflict deployment provides unmatched battlefield validation

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement costs are prohibitively high once deployed
Top-level security clearances and 20+ year government trust relationship. Virtually impossible for new entrants to replicate
Rapid customer acquisition through AIP boot camps and expanding Ontology data model ecosystem
Real-time target identification in the Iran conflict. Combat data is the ultimate competitive advantage

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Hardware-focused, more complementary than competitive with Palantir's software platform

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competitors. Significantly behind Palantir in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Scale advantage but cannot match depth of Palantir's specialized Ontology platform

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Far behind Palantir in both revenue scale and growth rate

recentNews.headline: Pentagon adopts Maven AI as core US military system
recentNews.significance: Deputy Secretary of Defense memo designates Maven Smart System as program of record. Long-term military-wide deployment confirmed

recentNews.headline: Silicon Valley defense tech booms, Palantir AI deployed in Iran conflict
recentNews.significance: NYT reports Anthropic AI + Palantir system analyzing Pentagon intelligence. Live combat AI validation

recentNews.headline: UBS raises target from $180 to $200, Strong Buy
recentNews.significance: Karl Keirstead cites revenue acceleration and Maven adoption as basis for 11% target increase

recentNews.headline: $11.2B revenue backlog, $10B Army contract, 61% growth outlook
recentNews.significance: FY2026 guidance of 61% growth. Major military contracts and backlog secure long-term visibility

recentNews.headline: Simply Wall St analyzes PLTR valuation amid major AI contracts and partnerships
recentNews.significance: NVIDIA, GE Aerospace, Moderna partnerships expanding. Commercial segment acceleration confirmed

analystOpinions.notableComment: UBS Karl Keirstead raised to $200 with Strong Buy. Wedbush Dan Ives maintains $230, emphasizing AI defense demand acceleration. Rosenblatt raised from $150 to $200

risks.title: Extreme Valuation
risks.description: TTM P/E of 239x is ~10x the S&P 500 average. Very high vulnerability to growth deceleration. Michael Burry has warned of head-and-shoulders pattern

risks.title: War-Dependent Revenue Risk
risks.description: Iran conflict deployment drove defense revenue surge, but conflict resolution could weaken growth momentum. War-based growth raises sustainability concerns

risks.title: Share Dilution
risks.description: Share count growing 4.67% YoY. Stock-based compensation continuously dilutes existing shareholder value

risks.title: Government Budget Volatility
risks.description: Government shutdowns or defense budget cuts would directly impact revenue. Government revenue share remains significant

risks.title: Ethics/Reputation Risk
risks.description: Growing ethical criticism of AI weapons targeting systems. Swiss magazine lawsuit and press freedom controversies add pressure

risks.title: Competitive Pressure
risks.description: Microsoft, AWS entering government AI market. Limited near-term threat but worth monitoring long-term

buyReasons.title: Dominant Defense AI Position
buyReasons.rationale: Maven officially adopted by the US military. 20+ years of government trust and security clearances are irreplaceable assets

buyReasons.title: Growth Accelerating
buyReasons.rationale: FY2025 +56% to FY2026 +65% guidance. Revenue growth is speeding up, not slowing down

buyReasons.title: Explosive Commercial Growth
buyReasons.rationale: US commercial revenue surpassed $500M. AIP boot camps rapidly converting enterprise customers, reducing government dependency

buyReasons.title: Fortress Balance Sheet
buyReasons.rationale: Cash $7.18B, debt $229M, FCF margin 47%. Strong earnings, minimal debt, overflowing cash

buyReasons.title: Rising Wall Street Targets
buyReasons.rationale: Consensus $196 (+30% upside). UBS, Rosenblatt and other major firms raising targets in succession

overallOpinion: Maven AI officially adopted as the Pentagon's core military system. Combined with live Iran conflict deployment, Palantir's defense AI dominance is cemented
Commercial revenue topped $500M, $11.2B backlog secured, FY2026 +65% guidance. Partnerships with NVIDIA and GE Aerospace expanding
However, P/E of 239x creates significant downside risk. Growth conviction is rewarded but any earnings miss could trigger a sharp selloff
Technically below both 50-day and 200-day SMAs with RSI at 51 (neutral). Short-term consolidation phase but fundamental momentum remains strong

investmentVerdict.summary: Maven's official military adoption and Iran conflict deployment confirm Palantir's unmatched defense AI position. FY2026 +65% growth guidance and commercial acceleration provide solid fundamentals. However, P/E of 239x demands disciplined entry. Dollar-cost averaging on pullbacks is the recommended approach.

threads.hook: Palantir Maven AI is now the Pentagon's official system. Here's what it means.
threads.text:
Palantir (PLTR) $150.68

Maven AI has been officially adopted as the Pentagon's core military system. Deputy Secretary of Defense signed the memo.

The numbers: Revenue $4.48B (+56%), FY2026 guidance $7.41B (+65%), operating margin 31.6%, FCF margin 47%, cash $7.18B.

Live combat deployment in Iran validates the AI weapons system. Commercial revenue topped $500M. NVIDIA and GE Aerospace partnerships expanding.

P/E of 239x is steep, but growth is accelerating and the balance sheet is a fortress.

Buy, 12-18 months. DCA on pullbacks.

fact.text:
Palantir (PLTR) $150.68

Maven AI has been officially adopted as the Pentagon's core military system. Deputy Secretary of Defense signed the memo.

The numbers: Revenue $4.48B (+56%), FY2026 guidance $7.41B (+65%), operating margin 31.6%, FCF margin 47%, cash $7.18B.

Live combat deployment in Iran validates the AI weapons system. Commercial revenue topped $500M. NVIDIA and GE Aerospace partnerships expanding.

P/E of 239x is steep, but growth is accelerating and the balance sheet is a fortress.

Buy, 12-18 months. DCA on pullbacks.

witty.hook: The Pentagon just gave Palantir the keys to the US military's AI brain
witty.text:
Pentagon: "Maven AI is official." (Deputy SecDef memo)

Revenue $4.48B (+56%), next year $7.41B (+65%). FCF margin 47%, cash $7.18B, debt $229M.

Iran conflict: live AI targeting confirmed. NYT reported it.

P/E 239x is wild. But 65% growth with 47% FCF margins? Name five companies that do both. I'll wait.

Commercial hit $500M too. This isn't just a war play anymore.

DCA on pullbacks.

empathy.hook: Palantir investors: a significant milestone for the long-term thesis
empathy.text:
Good news for Palantir holders.

Maven AI has been officially adopted as the Pentagon's core military system. This isn't just a contract renewal, it's an institutional commitment across all US military branches.

The numbers back it up: Revenue growing 56%, next year guided at 65%. Cash of $7.18B with barely any debt. FCF margin of 47%. Commercial revenue just crossed $500M.

The P/E of 239x means you'll face volatility. That's the price of owning a high-growth stock. But the fundamentals are strong and getting stronger.

If you believe in the AI defense thesis, this is validation. Stay patient, DCA on dips.
